validation_restart.reason: P12 UI override complete (Tailwind, Loading/Error, i18n, Onboarding, GSAP, Product Smoke). Product surface changed. Fresh post-P12 evidence required.
validation_restart.pre_p12_evidence: preserved as historical, not counted toward P6 closeout

review_blockers_fixed.blocker: P6-M10 behavior validation could be faked with arbitrary IDs
review_blockers_fixed.fix: Behavior validation now verifies persisted weekly review, calibration, and pattern records; requires a real 4-week window; and phase6 closeout re-verifies persisted evidence before passing.
